name: advisor-orchestrator-worker
tagline: Orchestrates a three-tier team of AI models (advisor, workers, orchestrator) through a frame/plan/delegate/verify/synthesize loop.
verdict: Well-built orchestration skill: declared network use matches behavior, concrete bash with injection-safe worker dispatch, explicit failure/fallback paths at every stage, a defined output contract, and a stated budget. No security or quality red flags found.
